title: The Call from an Unknown Number
content: Late one evening, Ethan received a phone call from an unfamiliar number. When he answered, no one spoke. He only heard distant traffic before the line disconnected. The same number called again the following day, creating even more curiosity. Instead of ignoring it, Ethan contacted his phone provider. They discovered that the calls came from an automated emergency notification system that had been incorrectly configured after recent maintenance. Once the settings were corrected, the calls stopped immediately. Although Ethan had imagined countless mysterious explanations, the incident turned out to be a simple technical error that affected several people in his neighborhood.
